description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a hidden .tests job limited to push events (only: pushes) and a hidden .rspec job that extends .tests, runs in the default test stage, and executes the shell command `rake rspec`. No explicit Docker image or services are specified, so the runner uses its default image. The .rspec job inherits the pushes-only rule from .tests, ensuring it runs only on push pipelines.
